positive: A stylized, symmetrical composition of deep-sea bioluminescent flora and fauna. The primary subject is a complex, interwoven network of abstract, glowing kelp structures and ethereal jellyfish forms, rendered in a neo-art deco aesthetic. Use a vibrant palette of electric cyan, sapphire blue, and neon magenta against a deep, velvety midnight black background. Emphasize sharp, glowing edges and geometric symmetry. The composition must feature clean, distinct silhouettes with high contrast, designed to be highly legible when printed on apparel. Minimalist background noise, maximum visual impact. Vector art style, UHD, high resolution, seamless repeat pattern potential, poster art.
negative: blurry, grainy, artifacts, watermark, text, signature, logos, poorly drawn hands, extra limbs, deformed, bad anatomy, low resolution, out of focus, noise, copyright
